d: Indris fires a silencing arrow at an enemy, dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage. The shot disables the enemy's stat buffs for [[8]]s and reduces their Phys & Magic DEF by [[20%]] for the rest of the battle. Unstackable. The buff-disabling effect doesn't work on Bosses.
When Indris fires a silencing arrow at a target with exposed weakness, he deals extra true damage equal to [[20%]] of the target's max HP. The true damage cannot exceed [[500%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of silencing arrow to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of silencing arrow to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of silencing arrow to [[300%]]<ATK>.

Passive. When an enemy is afflicted by at least [[3]] different stat reduction debuffs from Indris or his allies, the enemy's weakness is exposed. Indris' normal attacks deal [[60%]]<ATK> extra true damage to enemies with exposed weaknesses. This effect can trigger once every [[4]]s per enemy.
In addition, Indris' normal attack fires 3 arrows, each dealing [[165%]]<ATK> damage. The arrows prioritize different enemies with exposed weaknesses. If all 3 arrows hit the same target, the second and third arrows deal [[25%]] less damage.
Increases the damage of each arrow triggered with True Sight to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of each arrow triggered with True Sight to [[175%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of each arrow triggered with True Sight to [[180%]]<ATK>.

Indris knocks back all enemies within 2 tiles, pushing them out of the 2-tile area surrounding him. He then casts a binding spell on the nearest enemy, dealing [[170%]]<ATK> damage and immobilizing them for [[5]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[190%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[200%]]<ATK>.
Indris increases his ATK by [[6%]] during battle, plus an extra [[9%]] ATK if any enemy has exposed weakness.
Indris increases his ATK by [[8%]] during battle, plus an extra [[12%]] ATK if any enemy has exposed weakness.
Indris increases his ATK by [[10%]] during battle, plus an extra [[15%]] ATK if any enemy has exposed weakness.
Each time Indris triggers the exposed weakness damage bonus, he increases his ATK SPD by [[40]] for [[6]]s. Unstackable.
Increases the ATK SPD Indris gains when triggering the exposed weakness damage bonus to [[50]].
Indris' normal attacks reduce the target's Phys DEF by [[20%]] for [[6]]s. Unstackable.
Increases the ATK SPD Indris gains when triggering the exposed weakness damage bonus to [[60]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 ATK SPD, 20 Execution.

d: After hitting a target with Arcane Binding, Indris' normal attacks can trigger the exposed weakness damage bonus without cooldown for [[5]]s.

Within [[4]]s after Indris breaks an enemy's weakness, each of his normal attack arrow that hits the affected enemy deals extra physical damage equal to [[5%]] of the enemy's max HP. The damage cannot exceed [[150%]] of Indris' ATK.
